title: Bouncy Citrusy British Currant Full English Breakfast
description: A bouncy and citrusy twist on the classic British full English breakfast, featuring currants and a unique mortar and pestle pound method. Perfect for a vegan-friendly breakfast.

ingredients.name: Oat flour
ingredients.notes: Blended into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle

ingredients.name: Rice milk
ingredients.notes: Used for cooking the oat flour mixture

ingredients.name: Vegan sausages
ingredients.notes: Traditional British sausages replaced with vegan option

instructions: Pound the oat flour using a mortar and pestle until you get a fine powder.
Add the currants, rice milk, smoked paprika, and salt to the mortar and pestle and mix until well combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the vegan sausages.
Cook the sausages for 4-6 minutes on each side or until browned and cooked through.
